summary: Compile clean (3 pdflatex + bibtex passes all exit 0). 11/11 citations resolve. Every load-bearing v4 prose number reconciles to source: §4 4-class ordering (symmetric +0.180 > mixed +0.107 > asymmetric +0.059 > no_convergence -0.049 on gap_closed_ne / gap_closed_homogeneous), the 4x-budget structural-failure claim (-0.049 -> -0.108 on no_convergence cells, confirmed worse), the Nash 39-cell verdict_counts (12/11/10/6), and the analytical kappa-thresholds (0.028 / 0.65 / 0.972). Three MAJOR flags: M1 internal-memo cites needing arXiv (carried over from v3), M2 11-page PDF (user opted out of workshop budget), and M3 beta-independence stated as 13/13 in three locations should be 12/13 on the Nash 39-cell grid (cell kappa=0.9, c=0.5 has beta=0.1 -> mixed vs beta in {0.5, 0.9} -> asymmetric_only). M3 is a one-token revisor fix and does not shift any conclusion. v3 M3 (7x4 vs 7x6 table-dim nit) is resolved in v4.

most_important_flag: M3: beta-independence count is 12/13, not 13/13 as stated in main.tex L262, L394, and Figure 1 caption L332. The cell (kappa=0.9, c=0.5) has beta=0.1 -> mixed but beta in {0.5, 0.9} -> asymmetric_only. The qualitative beta-independence picture survives at 12/13, and no conclusion shifts, but the claim should not ship at 13/13. One-token revisor fix.
